# `polars selector float` for [expression](/commands/categories/expression.md)

<div class='command-title'>Select all float columns.</div>

## Signature

```> polars selector float {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input | output          |
| ----- | --------------- |
| any   | polars_selector |
## Examples

Select all float columns
```nu
> {
        "foo": ["x", "y"],
        "bar": [123, 456],
        "baz": [2.0, 5.5],
        "qux": [3.1, 2.7],
    } |
    polars into-df --as-columns |
    polars select (polars selector float) |
    polars sort-by baz qux |
    polars collect
╭───┬──────┬──────╮
│ # │ baz  │ qux  │
├───┼──────┼──────┤
│ 0 │ 2.00 │ 3.10 │
│ 1 │ 5.50 │ 2.70 │
╰───┴──────┴──────╯

```
